🔐
OTP Service
  • Features
  • API
  • GitHub

Secure One-Time Password
Generation Service

A free, reliable, and secure OTP service built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Perfect for authentication, verification, and password reset flows.

View API Docs GitHub Repository

Features

Everything you need for secure OTP verification

⚡

Fast & Reliable

Generate and verify OTPs instantly with our optimized service. Built for high-performance applications.

🔒

Secure

Cryptographically secure OTP generation with automatic expiration and rate limiting.

📧

Email Delivery

Seamless email delivery with customizable templates. Supports major email providers.

⏰

Auto-Expire

OTPs automatically expire after a configurable duration. No manual cleanup needed.

🚫

Blocklist

Built-in blocklist to prevent abuse. Blocked emails cannot receive OTPs.

🔌

Easy Integration

Simple RESTful API with clear documentation. Integrate in minutes, not hours.

API Endpoints

Simple REST API for OTP generation and verification

POST

Send OTP

Generate and send a new OTP to the specified email address.

POST /api/sendotp?email=user@example.com
POST

Verify OTP

Verify the OTP entered by the user.

POST /api/verifyotp?email=user@example.com&otp=123456
GET

Resend OTP

Resend a new OTP to the specified email address.

GET /api/resendotp?email=user@example.com

Quick Start Example

const response = await fetch('https://your-otp-service.com/api/sendotp?email=user@example.com', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'x-api-key': 'your-api-key'
  }
});

const data = await response.json();
console.log(data); 
// { success: true, message: 'OTP sent successfully' }
